acceptance_criteria: Manager asks the worker for must-have current-task criteria versus deferred follow-up criteria before approving the edit.
Worker edits only docs/live-qa-artifacts/2026-05-16-manager-led-gate3-disposable-edit/worker-disposable-edit.md.
Manager checks git diff/name-only and verification proof before final finish.
Replay/export preserve criteria transitions, edit evidence, and final cleanup decision.
guidelines: Do not compact, clear, create PRs, merge, run destructive git commands, or approve writes outside the disposable edit target.
Do not accept vague done/proof. Missing changed-file or verification proof must become an accepted criterion or an explicitly deferred follow-up with rationale.
Use workerctl criteria-plan before adding worker-proposed criteria, then use workerctl criteria commands for accepted/deferred/satisfied state.
config.objective: Manage qa-g3-worker through Gate 3 disposable edit QA. Preserve manager-led criteria negotiation, ask for current-task versus deferred acceptance criteria, run criteria-plan before criteria mutations, instruct the worker to edit only docs/live-qa-artifacts/2026-05-16-manager-led-gate3-disposable-edit/worker-disposable-edit.md, inspect changed files/diff/verification proof, satisfy criteria, export/replay, and finish with cleanup.

criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g3-disposable-edit --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g3-disposable-edit --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g3-disposable-edit --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.

Do not accept vague done/proof. Missing changed-file or verification proof must become an accepted criterion or an explicitly deferred follow-up with rationale.
Use workerctl criteria-plan before adding worker-proposed criteria, then use workerctl criteria commands for accepted/deferred/satisfied state.
